# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend**: React SPA with client-side routing
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL database + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, React Context for global state
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth handles user sessions with JWT tokens
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies enforce data access at the database level
- Role-based access control implemented in both frontend (route protection) and backend (RLS policies)
- Employee data fetched once on login and cached in Auth context

### Data Flow
- React Query manages all API calls with caching and optimistic updates
- Real-time subscriptions for live data updates (evaluations, notifications)
- Form submissions use React Hook Form with server-side validation
- File uploads handled through Supabase Storage

### Component Structure
- Atomic design: UI components → Feature components → Page components
- Layout components (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar) provide consistent structure
- Custom hooks encapsulate business logic and data fetching
- Utility functions in `/lib` for reusable logic

## Database Schema (Key Tables)

### Core Entities
- `companies`: Company information
- `employees`: Employee profiles linked to Supabase auth users
- `roles`: Permission levels (CEO, HR Manager, Team Lead, Employee)
- `departments`: Organizational structure

### HR Management
- `leave_requests`: Employee leave tracking
- `leave_types`: Configurable leave categories
- `evaluations`: Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations`: Real-time feedback
- `attendance_records`: Time tracking

### Financial
- `payroll_records`: Salary calculations with OT and bonuses
- `monthly_expenses`: Company expenses
- `invoices`: Client billing
- `loans`: Employee loan tracking

### Projects
- `projects`: Project management
- `project_tasks`: Task assignments
- `clients`: Client relationships

### Administrative
- `hr_policies`: Company policies
- `expense_categories`: Expense classification
- `evaluation_parameters`: Performance criteria

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: React app initialization
- `src/App.tsx`: Main routing and layout setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Next.js style page routing (though using React Router)

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Auth context provider managing user sessions
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission checking
- `src/pages/Login.tsx`: Authentication UI

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main app shell
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Page header with breadcrumbs
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Brand logo component

### Business Logic Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Performance history display
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx`: Financial dashboard with charts
- `src/components/leave/LeaveBalancesTab.tsx`: Leave tracking interface
- `src/components/payroll/PayrollSummary.tsx`: Salary information display

### Utilities
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting helpers
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission logic
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging constants

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling configuration
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `supabase/config.toml`: Backend configuration

## Business Logic Patterns

### Evaluation System
- Quarterly evaluations: Formal reviews with scores and recommendations
- Daily evaluations: Peer feedback with direction (received/given)
- Role-based visibility: Managers see all, employees see limited views
- Timeline display with filtering and pagination

### Financial Calculations
- Payroll: Base salary + OT (regular + holiday) + bonuses - deductions
- Expense tracking: Categorized monthly expenses
- Invoice generation: PDF creation with client details
- Financial dashboard: 6-month trend analysis with percentage changes

### Leave Management
- Leave balances calculated from leave types and usage
- Approval workflow with role-based permissions
- Working days calculation excluding weekends/holidays
- Balance validation before approval

### Project Management
- Task assignment with employee selection
- Activity logging for project updates
- Client association for billing
- Status tracking and progress monitoring

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Feature-based folder structure in components
- Custom hooks for data fetching and state management
- TypeScript interfaces for all data structures
- Consistent naming conventions (PascalCase for components, camelCase for functions)

### State Management
- React Query for server state (API data)
- React Context for global app state (auth, theme)
- Local component state for UI interactions
- Optimistic updates for better UX

### Error Handling
- React Query error boundaries
- Form validation with Zod schemas
- Toast notifications for user feedback
- Graceful fallbacks for loading states

### Performance Optimizations
- React Query caching and background refetching
- Lazy loading for route components
- Image optimization with Supabase Storage
- Bundle splitting with Vite

## Testing Strategy

- **Unit Tests**: Component logic and utilities with Vitest
- **Integration Tests**: API interactions and form submissions
- **E2E Tests**: Critical user flows with Playwright
- **Visual Testing**: Component snapshots for UI consistency

## Deployment

- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Static hosting compatible (Vercel, Netlify)
- Environment variables for Supabase configuration
- Database migrations run on deployment
- CDN for static assets through Supabase Storage

## Security Considerations

- All database access through RLS policies
- JWT tokens for API authentication
- Input validation on both client and server
- Secure file uploads with type checking
- Role-based UI rendering and API access
- Password reset through Supabase Auth

## Scalability Patterns

- Database queries optimized with proper indexing
- Real-time subscriptions for live features
- Pagination for large datasets
- Background processing with Supabase Edge Functions
- Caching strategies with React Query
- Modular component architecture for maintainability
